title: Global Government Contracts & Tenders Scraper Output
description: Structured public procurement opportunity records from official US, EU, and UK sources with stable record keys, publication and modification dates, normalized deadlines, keyword match evidence, buyers, values, classifications, and official source URLs.

results.title: Government contract and tender records
